title: Eremogone mukerjeeana
taxonomy: Eremogone mukerjeeana is classified under the family Plumbaginaceae and the order Plumbaginales. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Eremogone. This plant is native to the Himalayan region and is closely related to other species within the Plumbaginaceae family. Eremogone mukerjeeana is a succulent perennial herb that grows in rocky and mountainous areas. Its classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis.
